diagnostic_explanation: Both reviewers assign the same unsupported label and cite no evidence, so there is no citation difference. The main difference is in reason-code framing: option 1 uses the broader insufficiency formulation, while option 2 uses the more claim-targeted central_proposition_unsupported formulation. These are not in conflict; option 2 is a narrower restatement of why the claim fails, and both rationales agree that the record does not establish a direct launch occurred or was attempted. Confidence is identical at high.
